description_long: This is a single-story, sprawling house with a low, horizontal profile and an extended rectangular footprint. The roof is a complex hip style, featuring multiple intersecting sections and a prominent central gable over the main entryway. The exterior walls are clad in a light, neutral color, and the house features numerous symmetrically arranged windows along its length, providing ample natural light. The main entrance is accentuated by a covered porch with a peaked roof, supported by columns, creating a welcoming focal point. The structure sits on a flat, paved surface, typical of suburban or urban residential lots. The overall design suggests a modern ranch or contemporary suburban home, optimized for single-level living and accessibility.
description: A large, single-story house with a hip roof, symmetrical windows, and a prominent covered entryway. The design is modern and sprawling, typical of a ranch or contemporary suburban home.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch and central gable, flanked by symmetrical windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house and the intersecting hip roof sections.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long, continuous facade with multiple windows and no visible entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the depth and roof complexity seen in view 1.
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with a peaked gable roof, supported by columns, and a prominent main door
